_metadata.description: CRASH LENS - US DOT Districts and MPOs by State for Region and MPO View Levels
_metadata.notes: DOT districts map to 'Region' view level. MPOs map to 'MPO' view level. County-level uses FIPS codes (already configured).
_metadata.source: State DOT websites, FHWA, AMPO, BTS, Wikipedia MPO list
